## What You Can Do

Learn how to recycle right on our website:

- • How to recycle common recyclables. <<https://epa.gov/recycle/how-do-i-recycle-common-recyclables>>
- • Frequent questions about recycling. <<https://epa.gov/recycle/frequent-questions-recycling>>

Find a recycling location near you:

- • Search Earth911's website for nearby recycling locations. <<https://search.earth911.com/>>
- • Find locations to responsibly recycle on RecycleNation website.  
  <<https://recyclenation.com/>>
